title: Upstart (UPST) Q2 Earnings Report Preview
text: Upstart is set to report Q2 earnings after market close on August 5, 2024. Analysts anticipate revenue of $124.5 million, representing an 8.3% year-over-year decline, with an adjusted loss of -$0.39 per share. Recent Performance: The AI lending platform beat analysts' revenue expectations by 2.4% last quarter, reporting revenues of $127.8 million, up 24.2% year on year. However, the company provided underwhelming guidance for the following quarter and experienced declining gross margins. Track Record: Upstart has missed Wall Street revenue estimates three times over the past two years, which creates uncertainty heading into this announcement. Market Context: Growth stocks remain volatile as investors debate Federal Reserve policy. Upstart stock is up 2.2% over the past month, trading at $23.72 compared to an average analyst price target of $20.
